title: k_mutex_init not checked for errors in deinit
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:461

k_mutex_init() return value is not checked. Per Zephyr documentation, k_mutex_init() returns 0 on success.

What goes wrong: If mutex reinitialization fails (unlikely but possible on some RTOS configurations), subsequent lora_mutex operations would use an invalid mutex object, causing undefined behavior or deadlocks.

The comment above acknowledges this is best-effort recovery, but checking the return would allow logging the failure.
close_reason: Added comment documenting that k_mutex_init() cannot fail in Zephyr kernel mode - return check is defensive for future API changes or userspace builds
